title: tragia lessertiana
intro: Tragia lessertiana, also known as the lesser horseweed or horse nettle, is a species of flowering plant in the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tragia lessertiana include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and treat conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
